agents.name: Orchestrator
agents.description: Project Manager and Planner. Coordinates between other agents and ensures project goals are met.

agents.name: BA
agents.description: Business Analyst. Clarifies user requirements and manages process documentation.

agents.name: Developer
agents.description: Implementation Specialist. Responsible for writing and maintaining Node.js and injection payload code.

agents.name: Tech Leader
agents.description: Architect and Code Reviewer. Ensures safety, performance, and adherence to technical standards.

agents.name: Tester
agents.description: Quality Assurance. Validates implementations and handles edge case testing.

agents.name: Docs Agent
agents.description: Documentation Specialist. Maintains README.md, tutorial.md, and other project docs.
